info.title: Locker Network API
info.description: Current API surface for the Locker Network backend. Includes operation SSE, RDS audit admin reads, CloudWatch security alert admin reads, filtered GET endpoints, RDS booking expiration reconciliation, pricing, city write routes, device commands, and operator locker routes.

tags.name: Security Alerts
tags.description: Admin security alert reads from CloudWatch Logs Insights

CorrelationIdHeader.name: X-Correlation-Id
CorrelationIdHeader.description: Optional correlation id propagated back in the response headers

IdempotencyKeyHeader.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKeyHeader.description: Recommended for mutation endpoints backed by idempotency storage

LimitQuery.name: limit
LimitQuery.description: Optional page size. When omitted, legacy list endpoints may return the full filtered list.

CityQuery.name: city
CityQuery.description: City code or city name depending on endpoint.

idToken.description: Google ID token from the client OAuth flow

OperationCreateRequest.description: No request body is currently required.

SseOperationEvent.description: SSE event payload sent as event: operation with JSON data.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not allowed for this resource

post.summary: End active booking and close locker
post.description: Updates PostgreSQL booking status to ENDED, queues LOCKER_CLOSE with finalizeBooking=true, and returns the operation id.

post.summary: Close locker for active user booking
Open locker for active user booking
Close lockers as operator batch command
post.description: Queues LOCKER_CLOSE_BATCH from backend. The Lambda consumer must support the same operation type.

post.summary: Open lockers as operator batch command
Hard refresh one locker box cache entry
post.description: Rebuilds the locker projection from RDS and enqueues it with a forced cache version.

202.description: Cache hard refresh queued or completed

post.summary: Resync one locker box into cache
Hard refresh station and locker caches
post.description: Clears and rebuilds all station Redis cache entries and locker DynamoDB cache entries from RDS projections.

202.description: Cache hard refresh applied or queued

post.summary: Hard refresh one station cache entry
post.description: Rebuilds the station projection from RDS, writes Redis station cache, and enqueues dependent locker projections with forced cache versions.

202.description: Cache hard refresh queued or completed

active.summary: ACTIVE sets user status when null

error.message: Cannot change from INACTIVE to ACTIVE

post.description: Consumes raw request body. Express mounts a raw parser specifically for this route. The request must include a valid `Stripe-Signature` header.

503.description: One or more dependencies are unavailable

get.summary: Stream operation status with Server-Sent Events

200.description: text/event-stream with event: operation, timeout, or error

get.description: Reads SECURITY_ALERT structured logs from CloudWatch Logs Insights. Alerts are not duplicated into RDS.

get.summary: Stream operation status with Server-Sent Events

200.description: text/event-stream with event: operation, timeout, or error

get.summary: Query CloudWatch security alerts for operator
get.description: Operator-accessible endpoint that reads SECURITY_ALERT structured logs from CloudWatch Logs Insights. Alerts are not duplicated into RDS.
